data.title: STMicroelectronics and Qualcomm Launch New IoT Module to Simplify Wireless Connectivity
data.description: STMicroelectronics, in collaboration with Qualcomm, introduces first STM32-ready wireless IoT modules simplifying development of advanced wireless solutions for industrial and consumer IoT applications.STMicroelectronics introduced first STM32-ready wireless IoT modules with Qualcomm, simplifying development of advanced wireless solutions.

data.title: Why Is Fertility Services Provider NewGenIvf Stock Rocketing On Wednesday?
data.description: NewGenIvf Group surged premarket after signing a binding term sheet for a reverse merger with European Wellness Investment Holdings.

data.title: Macy's, Dave & Buster's, Bausch + Lomb And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
Inflation Rises As Expected In November, Sustains Hopes For December Interest Rate Cut
data.description: Inflation pressures rise as expected in November, challenging Fed's target. CPI rises 2.7% YoY, matching estimates. Core inflation remains high at 3.3%.
